headline: Sapiens Named a Visionary in 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Decision Intelligence Platforms
summary: Sapiens International Corporation N.V. (Sapiens) today announced that Sapiens Decision has been named a 'Visionary' in the inaugural Gartner Magic Quadrant™ Decision Intelligence Platforms. Sapiens believes this recognition positions the company at the forefront of a business-critical technology that empowers organizations to combine decision modeling, AI, simulation, analytics, and related capabilities to improve business outcomes at scale.
